title:: Axiom with full PROV-O attribution chain

# Axiom — PROV-O Attribution Chain

An axiom asserting `Villa Rotonda subClassOf Palladian Villa` with a
full PROV-O chain: the axiom was generated by a software agent (the
sync service), which acted on behalf of a human (the curator), who in
turn was acting on behalf of the project itself. PROV-O `Activity` and
`Entity` nodes are embedded via `@included`.
